case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY VS. MAXEY SHARIF

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-28-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-28-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY IS PRESENT IS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH QUARTELL COLLECTIONS MANAGER. DEFENDANT SHARIF MAXEY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,461.44 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT MAXEY, SHERIF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 SERVED MAR-30-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAXEY, SHERIF
